falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by 15% over the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained bullish move would contradict the blowoff pattern's expectation of a sharp decline, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Market breaks above $50,000 (key resistance level) and closes 3% above it
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout would indicate continuation of the uptrend, not a blowoff scenario, falsifying the current HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volatility (30-day ATR) decreases by 30% from current levels
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Reduced volatility would contradict the blowoff pattern's typical high-volatility climax, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
